goal.statement: Increase storage access efficiency per footprint area

hypothesis.statement: With valid boundary and combination, access efficiency should improve

connector must exist in every usable combination
minimum structure requires vertical_rod + horizontal_rod + connector + panel

rule_pass_rate.description: module set must not be isolated

efficiency_rule.rule: at least one shelf in the unit footprint must have layers_n >= 2
efficiency_rule.statement: to improve access efficiency per unit footprint, at least one shelf must be configured with 2 or more layers

minimum_structure_rule.statement: minimum structure requires 4 vertical rods; every layer needs 4 connectors and 4 horizontal rods to support panel
